name: Media Tagging Manager Jellyfin Plugin
description: TEST BUILD — tags selected Jellyfin media with streaming providers and TV networks. Not a stable release.
overview: TEST BUILD — provider and network tagging for selected Jellyfin libraries.

versions.changelog: 0.1.0.39-test adds a direct API Settings save, keeps Main Settings from changing Provider/Network selections, preserves saved credentials against blank non-credential saves, and refreshes cached logos in the dashboard. Test only; not a stable release.
